overall.description: A first-person walk through a stormy downtown Los Santos night, starting at the Westin Bonaventure intersection and continuing along rain-slicked sidewalks past bus stops, fast food restaurants, and open plazas. The footage showcases high-quality game engine rendering with ray-traced reflections on the wet pavement and illuminated skyscrapers.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a rainy downtown intersection dominated by the Westin Bonaventure hotel and curved glass skyscrapers with teal lighting. The camera walks forward through the wet streets, turns right onto the sidewalk, and transitions into a corridor formed by tall buildings on both sides.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow downtown sidewalk flanked by tall buildings, the camera passes an illuminated bus stop shelter on the left and a Subway restaurant on the right. Blue USPS mailboxes appear on the left as the street continues through the rain-soaked urban canyon.

segments.scene_description: The sidewalk narrows as the camera passes USPS mailboxes and approaches a Taco Bell restaurant on the left. A phone booth stands further ahead on the left while an alley entrance appears on the right, with the street continuing through the misty, rain-soaked downtown corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian plaza with benches and modern buildings

events.description: sidewalk opens into a wider pedestrian plaza with benches
passing under brighter plaza lighting near building entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through an open plaza area with benches and approaching a more open urban space

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider pedestrian plaza with benches lining the right side and a modern glass building facade. The camera continues through this more open urban space with distant city lights visible ahead, the wet pavement reflecting the ambient lighting of the stormy night.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked downtown corridor that gradually transitions from a towering intersection into an open pedestrian plaza. It begins at a rainy intersection dominated by the teal lighting of the Westin Bonaventure and curved glass skyscrapers before turning right onto a sidewalk flanked by tall buildings. As the camera moves deeper into the urban canyon, the scene shifts past an illuminated bus stop and a Subway restaurant, continuing through the mist beside blue USPS mailboxes and a Taco Bell. The path then narrows further past a phone booth and a dark alley entrance before finally expanding into a wider plaza featuring benches and a modern glass facade. The movement concludes in this open space, where the wet pavement reflects the ambient glow of distant city lights under the stormy night sky.
